mitre_attack_stages.name: Normal Operations
mitre_attack_stages.description: System operating within baseline behavioral parameters

mitre_attack_stages.name: Initial Access
mitre_attack_stages.description: Adversary gains initial entry through spear phishing, exposed service exploitation, or compromised supply chain

mitre_attack_stages.name: Execution
mitre_attack_stages.description: Adversary executes malicious code on target systems via scripting engines or native OS tools

mitre_attack_stages.name: Persistence
mitre_attack_stages.description: Adversary establishes foothold through scheduled tasks, registry modifications, or firmware implants

mitre_attack_stages.name: Evasion
mitre_attack_stages.description: Adversary disables logging, masquerades processes, or uses rootkits to avoid detection

mitre_attack_stages.name: Discovery
mitre_attack_stages.description: Adversary enumerates network topology, running services, connected devices, and user accounts

mitre_attack_stages.name: Lateral Movement
mitre_attack_stages.description: Adversary moves to additional systems using stolen credentials, remote services, or exploitation of trust relationships

mitre_attack_stages.name: Impact
mitre_attack_stages.description: Adversary executes final objective: data exfiltration, service disruption, or physical process manipulation

edge_types.inject: Process injected code into another process
